response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust exposure in commercial routing or navigation systems, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his current proficiency in the required low-level systems programming and geospatial data pipelines.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level exposure with DLang, asynchronous I/O, and Linux server apps
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse technical stacks
concerns: No explicit commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map tiling contexts
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, not the low-latency systems required
Limited evidence of distributed systems work with fault tolerance or consistency guarantees
